items.title: [正面] Morimens is a turn-based roguelite where you explo...
items.summary:
Morimens is a turn-based roguelite where you explore a hexagonal map, filled with treacherous tiles, dangerous enemies. and event tiles which may either help or harm. You play as an investigator at Mythag University seeking a means of destroying 'Dissolution', a substance which infects the land and people, turning them into monsters and erasing every trace of their existence from the memory of the world; but you, alone, can remember what others have forgotten. In your pursuit of this goal, you summon and command Awakeners in battle: those who have died and been resurrected with strange abilities and often monstrous appearances referencing the various works of H. P. Lovecraft and his milieu. 

The card-based combat system is simple to grasp and offers substantial flexibility in tactics and team composition; units gained early in the game from standard summons are just as useful late in the game as those from the limited summons, who often have niche, specific combat styles. (I hesitate to call it 'gimmicky'- it feels more like encouraging experimentation with team setups and Realm usage, and also encouraging builds around a specific character.) 

The process of leveling a character can be tedious, and with the player needing fifteen(!) copies of a character to max out their Enlightenment level, character leveling feels like the game's most exploitative gacha bait, especially during limited summons. Despite its generosity with free Silver, Luminous Prisms, and Silver Cubes, I still consider this a major flaw with the game which detracts from its otherwise stellar presentation. If you are, at all, susceptible to gambling behaviors, avoid this game. 

Despite this, I am in love with not only the world itself, but each of the character Awakeners introduced throughout the narrative. They are each charming and wracked with mental instability, regrets, fears, or hidden agonies devouring them from the inside out, creating compelling personal narratives and a colorful cast to decorate your own Mythag's journey. I love the world of Kadath, which, despite the dire circumstances of its existence, continues to bustle with life and hope for the future. The narrative impresses me with its boldness in several character and plot decisions no other mobile game I've played would dare to take, as it pits its protagonist against nightmarish, world-devouring monsters. I'm eager to see where the writers take me in the future.

items.title: [正面] O jogo é simples o suficiente para cativar e compl...
items.summary:
O jogo é simples o suficiente para cativar e complexo o suficiente para prender, Mecãnica decente, não exatamente inovadora mas funciona (8/10)
Já o visual é deslumbrante, simplesmente Magnífico, tanto os Cenários, os personagens e as habilidades, um verdadeiro show de estética (10/10)
A história na contramão sequer me despertou interesse, e a tradução peca tornando esse ponto ainda mais alarmante, sinceramente sequer prestei atenção (?/10)
Fora isso a interface é bem ruinzinha e o jogo tem alguns problemas bem ocasionais de desempenho, ainda assim O GACHA MAIS GENEROSO QUE JA JOGUEI!

items.title:
[正面] Нишевая карточная игра в стиле аниме. 
Интересные ...
items.summary:
Нишевая карточная игра в стиле аниме. 
Интересные анимации. 
Тяночки могли быть и получше, но тут субьективно. Много текста с плохим переводом, регистрация на стороннем сайте.
За бесплатно пробывать такое можно.
Оценка 5 из 10.
